Listening to you

  • Tweet

The most important thing for any politician to do is listen. As your Conservative Member of Parliament for the new Mid Buckinghamshire constituency, I want to hear what you think, either locally or when it comes to national policies.

This survey is part of the pledge I made to ensure I am accessible, contactable, and visible across the market towns, villages and hamlets of the 336 square miles of the Mid Buckinghamshire constituency. My mission will always be to serve as Mid Buckinghamshire's champion in Westminster, not Westminster's voice in Mid Buckinghamshire.

Please do complete the survey here and let me know what matters most to you and your family. I will read every submission personally and ensure your views are heard clearly.

I look forward to hearing from you,

Greg Smith MP

Bluetree_survey

  • Current National Issues
  • Get involved
  • Your details
In order to make this survey representative, how did you vote in the 2024 General Election?

This question contains special category data relating to your political opinion that may be shared with the wider Conservative Party for the purposes of Democratic Engagement with your permission. Please only answer this question if you consent to the processing of this data and sharing it with Conservative Party in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy policy. If you do not answer this question then this data will not be shared.

Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire
